svg.text: A wrapper over SBI’s core banking: APEX reasons and decides — the customer executes on SBI’s own page. APEX never writes to CBS.

svg.text: Execution boundary: APEX hands off a deep link; the customer completes the action on SBI’s own page (YONO / onboarding) — APEX never executes a write.
